title: Implement shader-based vertex displacement

tests.name: PointCloud ShaderMaterial includes uDisplacementScale uniform
tests.description: Verify that the point cloud ShaderMaterial has the new uDisplacementScale uniform required for simplex noise displacement scaling.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: RibbonField ShaderMaterial includes uDisplacementScale uniform
tests.description: Verify that the ribbon field ShaderMaterial has the new uDisplacementScale uniform.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: PointCloud vertex shader contains snoise function (simplex noise)
tests.description: Verify that the point cloud vertex shader source includes the snoise function from the prepended simplex3d.glsl chunk.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: RibbonField vertex shader contains snoise function (simplex noise)
tests.description: Verify that the ribbon field vertex shader source includes the snoise function from the prepended simplex3d.glsl chunk.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: PointCloud vertex shader contains fbm3 function (fractal brownian motion)
tests.description: Verify that the point cloud vertex shader includes the fbm3 wrapper function for multi-octave simplex noise.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: RibbonField vertex shader contains fbm3 function
tests.description: Verify that the ribbon field vertex shader includes the fbm3 wrapper function.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: Bass energy sets uBassEnergy and uDisplacementScale > 0 for large-scale 3D displacement
tests.description: With high bassEnergy, verify that uBassEnergy uniform is set high and uDisplacementScale is > 0, confirming bass drives large-scale GPU displacement.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Bass energy affects large-scale displacement in 3D

tests.name: Bass energy sets uBassEnergy and uDisplacementScale > 0 on RibbonField
tests.description: With high bassEnergy on ribbon field, verify bass displacement uniforms are properly set.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Bass energy affects large-scale displacement in 3D

tests.name: Zero bass still has non-negative uDisplacementScale (no negative displacement)
tests.description: When bassEnergy is 0, uDisplacementScale should still be >= 0 (derived from motionAmplitude * structureComplexity).
tests.acceptance_criteria: Bass energy affects large-scale displacement in 3D

tests.name: Treble energy sets uTrebleEnergy > 0 for fine-grain displacement
tests.description: With high trebleEnergy, verify uTrebleEnergy uniform is set, confirming treble drives fine-grain displacement/point size on GPU.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Treble energy affects fine-grain displacement or point size

tests.name: Treble energy sets uTrebleEnergy > 0 on RibbonField
tests.description: With high trebleEnergy on ribbon field, verify treble displacement uniform is properly set.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Treble energy affects fine-grain displacement or point size

tests.name: Deformation evolves over time — uTime differs at elapsed=0 vs elapsed=30000 on PointCloud
tests.description: Verify that draw() at two different elapsed times produces different uTime values, confirming noise field drifts over time.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Deformation evolves over time (not static modulation)

tests.name: Deformation evolves over time — uTime differs at elapsed=0 vs elapsed=30000 on RibbonField
tests.description: Same time evolution test for ribbon field.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Deformation evolves over time (not static modulation)

tests.name: No CPU per-point loops — position buffer version unchanged after draw() on PointCloud
tests.description: Verify draw() does NOT modify the CPU-side position buffer (all deformation GPU-side via shader). Position attribute version must not change.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: No CPU per-point loops — position buffer version unchanged after draw() on RibbonField
tests.description: Same CPU deformation guard for ribbon field.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: uDisplacementScale derived from motionAmplitude * structureComplexity on PointCloud
tests.description: Verify that uDisplacementScale reflects motionAmplitude * structureComplexity. With reduced motion (0.2) and low complexity (0.5), displacement scale should be < 0.3.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: uDisplacementScale is higher with full motionAmplitude and high structureComplexity
tests.description: Verify that full motion and high complexity produce a larger displacement scale than reduced motion.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: PointCloud vertex shader no longer contains layeredNoise function
tests.description: After simplex noise replacement, the old sine-hash layeredNoise function should be removed from the vertex shader.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: RibbonField vertex shader no longer contains layeredNoise function
tests.description: Same layeredNoise removal check for ribbon field shader.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: Low quality tier (1 octave) still produces valid shader uniforms on PointCloud
tests.description: Verify that low quality tier with noiseOctaves=1 still compiles and produces valid uniforms.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: Medium quality tier (2 octaves) produces valid shader uniforms on PointCloud
tests.description: Verify medium quality tier with noiseOctaves=2 works correctly.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: High quality tier (3 octaves) produces valid shader uniforms on PointCloud
tests.description: Verify high quality tier with noiseOctaves=3 works correctly.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: uDisplacementScale updates when frame params change on PointCloud
tests.description: Verify that uDisplacementScale dynamically updates when motionAmplitude or structureComplexity change between frames.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Deformation evolves over time (not static modulation)

tests.name: Existing radial expansion displacement is preserved on PointCloud
tests.description: Verify that the existing bass-driven radial expansion layer still functions — uBassEnergy uniform should update as before.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Bass energy affects large-scale displacement in 3D

tests.name: Existing twist displacement is preserved in PointCloud shader
tests.description: Verify that twist displacement code is still present in the vertex shader.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Bass energy affects large-scale displacement in 3D

tests.name: Existing treble jitter displacement is preserved in PointCloud shader
tests.description: Verify that treble micro-displacement code is still present in the vertex shader.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Treble energy affects fine-grain displacement or point size

tests.name: Existing pointer repulsion is preserved in PointCloud shader
tests.description: Verify that pointer repulsion code is still present in the vertex shader.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: Existing ribbon sway is preserved in RibbonField shader
tests.description: Verify that the ribbon-specific sinusoidal sway (ribbonPhase) is still present as an additive layer.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Bass energy affects large-scale displacement in 3D

tests.name: Reduced motion calms displacement on PointCloud (motionAmplitude=0.2)
tests.description: With prefers-reduced-motion (motionAmplitude=0.2), verify uMotionAmplitude and uDisplacementScale are both low.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: Warp continues when audio is silent (bass=0, treble=0) — uTime still advances
tests.description: Verify that the simplex noise deformation still evolves over time even with no audio energy (simulating muted playback).
tests.acceptance_criteria: Deformation evolves over time (not static modulation)

tests.name: No localStorage, sessionStorage, or cookie access during init or draw with new shader
tests.description: Privacy guard — verify no forbidden storage APIs are accessed during the enhanced shader workflow.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.name: uCadence uniform reflects cadence for noise evolution speed modulation
tests.description: Verify uCadence is set from VisualParams.cadence and will modulate noise evolution speed in the shader.
tests.acceptance_criteria: Deformation evolves over time (not static modulation)
